name: abdomen/pelvis CT — negation conflict (Findings deny appendicitis, Impression asserts it)

report.technique: Contrast-enhanced CT of the abdomen and pelvis, portal-venous phase.
report.findings: Liver: normal. Gallbladder: normal. Pancreas: normal. Spleen: normal. Kidneys: normal. Bowel: appendix is normal calibre with no wall thickening or periappendiceal fat stranding; no appendicitis. Vasculature: aorta normal. Bones: no aggressive lesion.
report.impression:
1. Acute appendicitis.
2. No other acute intra-abdominal process.
